title: [Abandoned Farm, Garden]
description: A broken-down farm house stands just inside the wooden archway, its empty door and broken windows leering over the snow-filled garden.  A dilapidated barn slumps into the snow to the north of the garden.  To the southeast, a thin trail leads around the corner of the house.

wayto.31352: ;e if GameObj.inv.find {|obj| obj.noun == "key"};fput "go snow cabin";else;empty_hand;multifput "get my key from my #{UserVars.key_sack}","go snow cabin","put my key in my #{UserVars.key_sack}";fill_hand;end
